queries.question: For each epidemiological study, list the corresponding methods.
queries.sql: select epidemiological_study.name , methods.method_name from Epidemiological_Study_Methods join Methods on Epidemiological_Study_Methods.method_id = Methods.method_id join Epidemiological_Study on Epidemiological_Study_Methods.epidemiological_study_id = Epidemiological_Study.study_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?method_name WHERE {
  ?epidemiological_study_methods a :Epidemiological_Study_Methods .
  ?methods a :Methods .
  ?epidemiological_study_methods p:hasMethods ?methods .
  ?epidemiological_study a :Epidemiological_Study .
  ?epidemiological_study_methods p:hasEpidemiological_Study ?epidemiological_study .
  ?epidemiological_study p:name ?name .
  ?methods p:method_name ?method_name .
}

queries.question: What methods are associated with every epidemiological study?
queries.sql: SELECT Methods.method_name  from Epidemiological_Study_Methods join Methods on Epidemiological_Study_Methods.method_id = Methods.method_id join Epidemiological_Study on Epidemiological_Study_Methods.epidemiological_study_id = Epidemiological_Study.study_id   GROUP BY Epidemiological_Study_Methods.method_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Epidemiological_Study_Methods.epidemiological_study_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Epidemiological_Study)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What methods are associated with every epidemiological study?
